name: opencode-agent-loop
description: A structured multi-agent feature-development loop for OpenCode with free-first subagent routing and controlled paid fallback.

scripts.test: node tests/reliability-v020-tests.mjs && node tests/budget-tests.mjs && node tests/budget-audit-tests.mjs && node tests/routing-tests.mjs && node tests/runtime-tests.mjs && node tests/tool-integration-tests.mjs && node tests/bypass-detection.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run validate:agents && npm run validate:portable
scripts.validate:portable: npm run validate:routing && npm run validate:budget && npm run validate:feature && node scripts/check-doc-links.mjs && npm test
